name: Breville Group Limited
analysis: BRG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$31.7700, stop A$27.4725, target A$35.1205 (0.78:1) — then trail it.
